meta.title: Top 5 Magnesium Supplements for Sleep - Tier List

segments.label: HOOK 1 — Scroll Stopper
segments.spoken_text: I ranked the top 5 magnesium supplements for sleep so you don't have to.
segments.notes: Fast cut, bold text overlay. Avatar speaks directly to camera.

segments.spoken_text: Number 5, Nature Made. It uses magnesium oxide which has about 8% absorption. You're basically flushing your money.
Number 4, NOW Foods. It's a blend of oxide and citrate, but they hide the ratio in a proprietary blend. That's a red flag.
Number 3, Life Extension. Pure citrate, better absorption. Solid budget pick but nothing that stands out.

segments.label: HOOK 2 — Re-engagement
segments.spoken_text: Now here's where it actually gets interesting.
segments.notes: Brief pause, zoom shift, energy change. Re-hooks viewers at ~50% mark.

segments.spoken_text: Number 2, Pure Encapsulations. Chelated bisglycinate, great absorption, clean label. Practitioners love it. But it's still just magnesium by itself.

And number 1 was the only formula combining chelated magnesium with saffron extract and L-Theanine. Three ingredients that actually work together to help you fall asleep faster and stay asleep. This is what everyone else is missing.
segments.notes: Longer segment. Winner reveal with glow/pulse effect. Don't name the product — curiosity drives click.

segments.spoken_text: Click the link to see the full comparison.
segments.notes: Clear CTA pointing down. Arrow animation.
